name: Global Menkul Degerler Anonim Sirketi
summary: Global Menkul Degerler Anonim Sirketi provides capital market brokerage services to individuals, financial institutions, and local and international investors. It operates through a network of three branches. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Global Menkul Degerler Anonim Sirketi operates as a subsidiary of Global Yatirim Holding A.S.
